Вкладки работают но не все. Создай - новый слой Конденсирующая-Линза . parser - copy block - через Bridge . Обработчик сохраняет json Можешь создать по подобных тегам создать массив с json двухуровневой группировкой .

LFE final singularity lyrics
imported

Imported from mixed JSON/text document

importlfe_final_singularity_lyricslfefinalsingularitylyricsthe_completion_setthecompletionsetthe_eternal_return_seteternalreturnthe_final_dialogue_v4dialogue
!!!!слой - линза увеличение .!!! https://codepen.io/ninivert/pen/qMZdqN https://openflexure-microscope-software.readthedocs.io/en/stable/plugins.html // --- Rendering --- function renderList() { const container = document.getElementById('studios-list'); document.getElementById('list-count').innerText = state.filteredStudios.length; container.innerHTML = state.filteredStudios.map(s => `
${s.studioType.label}

${s.city} ${s.address}
${s.devices.map(d => { const hex = payload.devicePalette[d.value] || '#d4af37'; // Convert hex to rgba for soft background const r = parseInt(hex.slice(1, 3), 16), g = parseInt(hex.slice(3, 5), 16), b = parseInt(hex.slice(5, 7), 16); return `${d.label}`; }).join('')}

${s.description}

`).join(''); // Attach click to center map and expand container.querySelectorAll('.studios-map-card').forEach(card => { card.addEventListener('click', (e) => { // Toggle expansion card.classList.toggle('is-expanded'); // Center map const id = parseInt(card.dataset.id); const studio = payload.studios.find(s => s.id === id); if(studio && studio.coords && mapInstance) { mapInstance.setCenter([studio.coords.lat, studio.coords.lon], 14, {duration: 400}); if(window.innerWidth <= 991) { document.querySelector('[data-view-btn="map"]').click(); } } // Recalculate layout as card height changed setTimeout(() => { updateSceneLayout(); applyGoldenTypography(); // Re-run for this card as H_free might have changed }, 300); }); }); // Trigger MMSS Title Engine after rendering setTimeout(applyGoldenTypography, 50); } function renderMap() { if(!objectManager) return; objectManager.removeAll(); const features = state.filteredStudios.filter(s => s.coords).map(s => ({ type: 'Feature', id: s.id, geometry: { type: 'Point', coordinates: [s.coords.lat, s.coords.lon] }, properties: { balloonContentHeader: `${s.name}`, balloonContentBody: `${s.address}

${s.studioType.label}`, hintContent: s.name } })); objectManager.add({ type: 'FeatureCollection', features }); if(features.length > 0) { mapInstance.setBounds(objectManager.getBounds(), { checkZoomRange: true, zoomMargin: 50 }); } } // ============================================================================ // MMSS_STUDIOS_MAP_SCENE_ENGINE (Weight: 0.85) // LAYER A & B: Phi Vertical Layout & Density Fields // ============================================================================ function updateSceneLayout() { if (window.innerWidth <= 991) return; // Only apply on desktop const header = document.querySelector('.studios-map-header'); const topbar = document.querySelector('.studios-map-stage__topbar'); const chips = document.querySelector('.studios-map-stage__chips'); const listShell = document.querySelector('.studios-map-stage__list'); const hViewport = window.innerHeight; const hHeader = header.offsetHeight; // Calculate fixed heights in the scene const hFixed = topbar.offsetHeight + chips.offsetHeight; // Calculate free space (viewport - header - fixed elements - padding) // 48px accounts for stage padding (24px top/bottom) const hFree = hViewport - hHeader - hFixed - 48; // LAYER A: Apply Golden Ratio (phi) const phi = 1.61803398875; // Map gets the larger portion (phi / (1+phi) ≈ 0.618) const hMapTarget = Math.max(400, hFree * (phi / (1 + phi))); // List gets the remainder const hListTarget = Math.max(300, hFree - hMapTarget); // Set CSS Variables for layout document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--h-map-target', `${hMapTarget}px`); document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--h-list-target', `${hListTarget}px`); // LAYER B: Density Fields Logic const visibleCount = state.filteredStudios.length; const rhoList = visibleCount / hListTarget; // Adjust gap based on density if (rhoList > 0.015) { listShell.style.gap = '12px'; // High density, pack tighter } else { listShell.style.gap = '24px'; // Low density, breathe } } // ============================================================================ // MMSS_GOLDEN_TITLE_GLYPH_ENGINE (Weight: 0.85) // LAYER 0-4: Typography Synthesis & Animation // ============================================================================ function applyGoldenTypography() { const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.studios-map-card'); const phi = 1.61803398875; const isDark = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') === 'dark'; // Get base values from CSS variables const style = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement); const hBase = style.getPropertyValue('--studio-title-h').trim(); const sBase = style.getPropertyValue('--studio-title-s').trim(); const lBase = parseFloat(style.getPropertyValue('--studio-title-l-base').trim()); cards.forEach(card => { const titleBtn = card.querySelector('.studios-map-card__title-button'); if (!titleBtn) return; const rawText = titleBtn.getAttribute('data-raw-text'); // LAYER 4: Geometric Input // Calculate available space for the title const hCard = card.offsetHeight || 220; const bottomZone = card.querySelector('.studio-card__bottom-zone'); const hBottom = bottomZone ? bottomZone.offsetHeight : 100; // 40px accounts for card padding const hFree = Math.max(60, hCard - hBottom - 40); // LAYER 2: Glyph and Word Field (DOM Construction) titleBtn.innerHTML = ''; const words = rawText.split(' '); const textNoSpaces = rawText.replace(/\s/g, ''); const avgWordLen = textNoSpaces.length / words.length; const totalGlyphs = textNoSpaces.length; words.forEach((word, wIdx) => { const wordSpan = document.createElement('span'); wordSpan.className = 'studio-card__title-word'; // Golden word spacing: spacing ∝ 1/φ^(len/avg_len) const lenRatio = word.length / avgWordLen; const spacingFactor = 1 / Math.pow(phi, lenRatio); wordSpan.style.marginRight = `${0.35 * spacingFactor}em`; word.split('').forEach((char) => { const charSpan = document.createElement('span'); charSpan.className = 'studio-card__title-glyph'; charSpan.innerText = char; wordSpan.appendChild(charSpan); }); titleBtn.appendChild(wordSpan); if (wIdx < words.length - 1) { titleBtn.appendChild(document.createTextNode(' ')); } }); // LAYER 3: Phi Typography Synthesis const rhoTitle = totalGlyphs / hFree; // Target font size: clamp(f_base * φ^k, f_min, f_max) const fBase = 22; // k is a function of density. Higher density -> smaller k -> smaller font let k = 1 - (rhoTitle * 2.5); let fTitle = Math.max(14, Math.min(32, fBase * Math.pow(phi, k))); // Target line height: clamp(φ / (1 + ρ_title), lh_min, lh_max) let lhTitle = Math.max(1.1, Math.min(1.6, phi / (1 + rhoTitle * 0.5))); // LAYER 2B: Color Density Mapping const rhoNorm = Math.min(rhoTitle / 0.15, 1); // Normalize against a reference density let lTarget; const kL = 20; // Amplitude of color shift if (isDark) { // Dark theme: denser text gets darker (lower L) lTarget = lBase - (kL * rhoNorm * phi); lTarget = Math.max(50, Math.min(lTarget, 95)); } else { // Light theme: denser text gets lighter (higher L) lTarget = lBase + (kL * rhoNorm * phi); lTarget = Math.max(10, Math.min(lTarget, 60)); } // Apply calculated styles titleBtn.style.fontSize = `${fTitle}px`; titleBtn.style.lineHeight = lhTitle; titleBtn.style.color = `hsl(${hBase}, ${sBase}, ${lTarget}%)`; // LAYER 1: Anime Glyph Animation if (typeof anime !== 'undefined' && !card.classList.contains('is-expanded')) { // Only animate if not expanding (to avoid re-triggering on click) anime({ targets: card.querySelectorAll('.studio-card__title-glyph'), opacity: [0, 1], translateY: ['0.75em', '0em'], duration: 400, // Stagger step adjusted by phi delay: anime.stagger(40 / phi), easing: 'easeOutQuad' }); } else { // Ensure visible if anime fails or is skipped card.querySelectorAll('.studio-card__title-glyph').forEach(g => { g.style.opacity = 1; g.style.transform = 'none'; }); } }); } // Start init(); });
